items.title: Started building my PhD application portfolio at UC Berkeley
items.content: 📚 Now based in the Bay Area, self-studying daily at UC Berkeley libraries and engaging with the research community. Targeting Stanford CS PhD (Fall 2027) with a focus on LLM alignment and safety.

items.title: [Launchpad S1](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/Z8blxU7i6LuY2KxZQAIQlw?scene=1) successfully held in Shanghai
items.content: 🚀 Co-organized Launchpad S1 with MAL.LAB — a product launch and go-to-market event in Minhang, Shanghai. Brought together founders and builders, sponsored by DeepTech. From idea to execution in two months.

items.title: Joined GuruGame HK as ML Engineer Intern
items.content: 🎮 Started building an ad campaign agent with SFT fine-tuning, tool-calling, and RAG pipeline. Released [AdCampaignAgent-SFT](https://github.com/ChaoyuWang04/AdCampaignAgent-SFT) dataset on HuggingFace.

items.title: Graduated from Northwestern University
items.content: 🎓 Completed M.S. in Engineering Science & Applied Mathematics at Northwestern University.

items.title: Joined Huatai Securities as Software Dev Intern
items.content: 📈 Built a RAG-based Q&A system over 2,000+ financial documents and applied GRPO alignment on DeepSeek-R1-7B, reducing hallucination rate from 8.0% to 1.2%.

items.title: Graduated from UC San Diego
items.content: 🎓 Completed B.S. in Applied Mathematics at UC San Diego.

items.title: AdCampaignAgent-SFT
items.description: Rule-based synthetic SFT dataset for mobile game UA agents, featuring tool-calling, multi-turn reasoning chains, and ROAS/Retention safety baselines. Fine-tuned Qwen3-0.6B with LoRA, achieving 86%+ end-to-end task completion.

items.degree: M.S. in Engineering Science & Applied Mathematics

items.title: ML Engineer Intern
items.description: Built an ad campaign agent with multi-turn tool-calling and a RAG pipeline; constructed and augmented a 7,600+ sample SFT dataset; achieved 86%+ end-to-end task completion.

items.title: Software Dev Intern
items.description: Built a RAG Q&A system over 2,000+ multi-format financial documents; applied GRPO alignment on DeepSeek-R1-7B; reduced hallucination rate from 8.0% to 1.2%.
